news.headline: Lennar opens Cartwright Ranch, a master-planned community in Crandall, Texas, 30 miles from Dallas, with almost 4,000 homes.
news.summary: In Crandall, Texas, on June 27, 2024, Lennar, a top homebuilder in the US, unveiled Cartwright Ranch, a new master-planned community. Situated in Crandall, about 30 miles southeast of Dallas, this growing suburb is now home to the grand opening of the community. Cartwright Ranch boasts nearly 4,000 residences as part of its development.

news.headline: SIGGRAPH 2024 will feature research teams showcasing innovative work in AI, computer graphics, and design to bring digital characters to life.
news.summary: At the 2024 SIGGRAPH event, teams from several institutions will present their innovative projects that animate digital characters and environments. The event will take place in Denver on June 27, 2024. These projects highlight advancements in the intersection of artificial intelligence and computer graphics, demonstrating cutting-edge technologies. This gathering underscores the collaborative efforts of researchers in pushing the boundaries of creating immersive digital experiences.

news.headline: PyroGenesis reports voting results from 2024 annual meeting: Held on June 27 in virtual format. Company designs plasma processes to reduce GHG.
news.summary: In Montreal on June 27, 2024, PyroGenesis Canada Inc. shared the outcomes from its recent annual shareholder meeting. The high-tech company, known for its innovative plasma processes and eco-friendly solutions aimed at curbing greenhouse gases and environmental contaminants, revealed details of the voting session. The meeting, conducted virtually, showcased the company's commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement. PyroGenesis trades on the TSX as PYR, the OTCQX as PYRGF, and the FRA as 8PY. For more information, visit their website at pyrogenesis.com.

news.headline: FDA authorizes Cepheid's Xpert® HCV test for detecting hepatitis C virus in 1 hour, with CLIA Waiver.
news.summary: Today, Cepheid disclosed that it received FDA De Novo marketing authorization and CLIA Waiver approval for Xpert® HCV, allowing for the rapid detection of hepatitis C virus (HCV) in approximately one hour. This molecular testing solution is the only one of its kind, marking a significant advancement in the field. This approval underscores the importance of quick and accurate diagnostics, with the potential to impact countless lives.

news.headline: Global SaaS market to grow by USD 423.2 billion from 2024-2028 at 21.21% CAGR; mobile apps to drive growth - Technavio.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in New York City, it was reported that the global software as a service (SaaS) market is projected to experience substantial growth, with an estimated increase of USD 423.2 billion anticipated between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. The market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.21% throughout the forecast period. The surge in demand for mobile applications and services is believed to be a driving factor in this growth trend.

news.headline: O-I reports progress towards sustainability goals in 2024 report update. Innovative strategies driving progress.
news.summary: The recent 2024 Sustainability Report update reveals substantial advancements made by the company towards achieving its ambitious sustainability objectives. The report highlights impressive figures indicating notable progress in various areas. The company has shown commendable dedication towards reaching its sustainability targets.

news.headline: Global curved TV market to grow by USD 12.72 billion (2024-2028) due to augmented experience demand, Techavio reports.
news.summary: In New York on June 27, 2024, it was reported that the global curved television market is projected to increase by USD 12.72 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. This market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 29.08% over the forecast period. The rise in demand for enhanced viewing experiences is a driving factor behind this growth.

news.headline: Ontario International Airport wins 2 FAB awards for food and beverage excellence. Leading in regional sector.
news.summary: In Ontario, California on June 27, 2024, Ontario International Airport (ONT) was recognized with two additional prestigious industry awards, this time focusing on excellence within the travel food-and-beverage sector. This prominent airport located in Southern California achieved top regional rankings in the category of Best Travel Food and Beverage. This recognition highlights ONT's commitment to providing exceptional dining options for travelers.

news.headline: Amesite collaborates with professional college counselors for Amesite Explorer Seminars, offering bespoke high school programs with direct access to top faculty.
news.summary: The company offers unique high school programs tailored for students, allowing direct access to top faculty members. This personalized approach ensures that students can benefit from the expertise of renowned educators. The programs are designed to provide a high level of interaction and support, offering a one-of-a-kind learning experience. This initiative aims to elevate the educational experience for high school students, with a focus on individualized attention and high-quality instruction. Students can engage directly with distinguished faculty members, enhancing their academic journey.

news.headline: TV exec Jamie Kellner, who founded Fox and WB, passes away at 77. He made the networks strong competitors of ABC, CBS, and NBC.
news.summary: Focusing on a younger demographic, he successfully positioned the networks as strong competitors to industry giants ABC, CBS, and NBC, who had dominated television for over four decades.

news.headline: Enstar Group Limited signs adverse development cover agreement with Insurance Australia Limited on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Enstar Group Limited (NASDAQ: ESGR) revealed on June 27, 2024, that its subsidiary has entered a deal with Insurance Australia Limited, representing Insurance Australia Group (“IAG”), for an adverse development cover agreement.

news.headline: NASA and Boeing to discuss ISS and Commercial Crew, evaluating Starliner's propulsion system on June 28 at 2 p.m. EDT.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, representatives from NASA's International Space Station and Commercial Crew Programs, along with Boeing, are set to engage in a media teleconference on June 28 at 2 p.m. EDT. The discussion will focus on the ongoing assessment of Starliner's propulsion system. NASA and Boeing are working closely to evaluate the performance of Starliner amidst its latest mission, with significant updates expected during the teleconference.

news.headline: Protagonist Therapeutics (PTGX) to join S&P SmallCap 600, replacing Encore Wire Corp. (WIRE) on July 3. Prysmian SpA acquiring Encore.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Protagonist Therapeutics Inc. (NASD: PTGX) announced it will be taking the place of Encore Wire Corp. (NASD: WIRE) in the S&P SmallCap 600 index starting on July 3. This change will occur before the market opens on that day. Additionally, Prysmian SpA (MTAA: PRY), a part of the S&P Europe 350 index, is in the process of acquiring Encore Wire Corp.

(referred to as "K92" or the "Company") shared the outcomes of its 2024 annual general and special meeting (“AGM”) of shareholders. Sales figures were below expectations, leading to a drop in the company's stock value. This news of underperformance was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

Nasdaq emerged as the standout performer of the day, while the Dow and S&P made marginal gains. Nvidia ended its two-day winning streak.

news.headline: Meta Platforms saw a breakout, software stocks led market, Dow Jones futures positive; Biden-Trump debate and Fed inflation gauge on horizon.
news.summary: Meta Platforms experienced a significant surge on Thursday, alongside software stocks which continued the strong rebound seen in June. Investors are keeping a close eye on the upcoming debate between Biden and Trump, as well as the Federal Reserve's inflation gauge. This sector is currently leading the market trend, indicating a potential shift in market dynamics. This information was featured in an article on Investor's Business Daily regarding the current state of Dow Jones Futures.

news.headline: Global finger millet market to grow by USD 5.20 billion from 2024-2028 at a CAGR of 6.78% due to low maintenance of cultivation, says Technavio.
news.summary: In recent news dated June 27, 2024, industry insights suggest that the worldwide finger millet market is projected to expand by approximately USD 5.20 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. Throughout the forecast period, the market is anticipated to increase at a compounded annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.78%. The cultivation of finger millet is noted for its low maintenance requirements, which adds to its appeal among farmers.

news.summary: An independent committee within Millicom (Tigo) board has assessed that the proposed acquisition bid from Atlas, priced at US$24 per share, would undervalue Millicom considering its projected financial progress.

news.headline: Tecsys Inc. reports record revenue for Q4 and FY2024, with SaaS revenue up 39%. SaaS RPO up 43% to $196.9 million in Q4. AEBITDA margin expected to reach 8-9% in FY2025 and 10-11% in FY2026. Q4 SaaS revenue at $14.2 million, totaling revenue at $44.0 million. FY2024 SaaS revenue at $51.9 million, totaling revenue at $171.2 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.8 million in Q4 and $9.6 million for FY2024. Dividend declared at $0.08 per share. Financial guidance provided for FY2025 and FY2026.
news.summary: Tecsys Inc., a supply chain management SaaS company, reported strong results for Q4 and fiscal year 2024. SaaS revenue increased by 39% to $51.9 million compared to $37.5 million in 2023. In Q4, SaaS revenue was $14.2 million, up from $11.1 million in Q4 2023. SaaS subscription bookings in Q4 saw a 108% increase to a record $8.0 million, and SaaS RPO climbed 43% to $196.9 million. Total revenue in Q4 reached a record $44.0 million, with gross margin at 47%. Operating expenses increased to $21.3 million, resulting in a loss from operations of $0.6 million. Net profit for Q4 was $0.3 million. Adjusted EBITDA was $2.8 million, up 14% from last year. For fiscal 2024, total revenue was $171.2 million, with a gross margin of 46%. Operating expenses were $76.5 million, resulting in a profit from operations of $1.9 million and a net profit of $1.8 million. Adjusted EBITDA for fiscal 2024 was $9.6 million. Tecsys provided financial guidance for FY25 and FY26, expecting total revenue growth of 7-9% and 30-32% SaaS revenue growth in FY25. A quarterly dividend of $0.08 per share was declared. These results showcase Tecsys' strong performance and growth trajectory in the SaaS market.

news.headline: Replay Destinations to develop 53-key luxury hotel in Healdsburg, CA, creating unique Sonoma-centric experience.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking move, a special collaboration has been formed to establish a distinctive hotel focusing on Sonoma in the vibrant wine region of HEALDSBURG, Calif. On June 27, 2024, Replay Destinations ("Replay"), a comprehensive destination development firm, revealed their intentions to create an unparalleled experience-driven hotel in the area. This innovative project aims to showcase Sonoma's essence through unique offerings and attractions. With a strong emphasis on creating a one-of-a-kind experience for guests, the project promises to bring a new dimension to the region's hospitality sector. This significant development marks an exciting phase in the evolution of the local tourism industry, with an anticipated influx of visitors and a boost to the economy. Stay tuned for more updates on this transformative endeavor set to redefine the essence of Sonoma.

news.headline: Exclusive events featuring Dom Perignon Champagne in Napa Valley, with latest wine news. #luxurywine #exclusiveevents

news.headline: Slate Office REIT appoints Charles Pellerin to Board of Trustees, effective June 25, 2024. Pellerin to join Audit Committee.
news.summary: Slate Office REIT (TSX: SOT.UN), a prominent owner and operator of premium workplace real estate based in Toronto, has revealed the appointment of Charles Pellerin to its Board of Trustees effective June 25, 2024. Mr. Pellerin, who will be a part of the Board's Audit Committee, serves as the Principal Partner and President of Pellerin Potvin Gagnon S.E.N.C.R.L., a notable independent accounting firm in Quebec. news.headline: Port of Houston Authority engages 2000 community members in outreach activities, fostering community stewardship.

During the meeting, it was reported that significant community outreach efforts had engaged almost 2,000 residents of neighboring areas by the end of May. The Port Commission prioritizes community engagement and appreciates the active involvement of around 2,000 individuals from nearby communities in these activities.
